text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hakodate! We maaaade it! ☆ Let's find some
vibey sightseeing spots before the race and get
hyped.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've been here so many times before, but I don't
think I've ever actually done any proper
sightseeing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to start with some sightseeing to set
the mood.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let's hit up the fish market! ☆ Waheeey! This is
gonna be lit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, look! They're selling crab over there!
choice_data_list: Well, would you look at that.
Well, would you look at that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Snow crabs are in season in the winter, but other
varieties are available in the summer in Hokkaido.
After eating our fill, we hike up to a lookout on a
hill outside the city.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yooo, this view is lit! ☆ Let's take a selfie over
here!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I never realized Hakodate could be so
fun. I've been missing out...
choice_data_list: Why didn't you ever go sightseeing before?
Why didn't you ever go sightseeing before?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to wonder. It seems a bit strange to visit
one of Hokkaido's leading cities for tourism
without doing any touristy activities.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Take a look over there for your answer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You see that mountain way over there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the towering mountain Mejiro Palmer is
pointing to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's Mount Yotei. And right there at the
bottom is the Mejiro estate. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This is basically my hometown. How often do you go sightseeing in your hometown?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's a fair point. It's hard to get too excited
about sightseeing where you grew up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Looking back on it, I guess I didn't give it a fair
shake.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But with my trainer and my bestie, even my
hometown can be lit like none other!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! Let's keep these vibes going for the
Hakodate Kinen! I bet I can go all out like this!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna slay, Palmster! ★ Take this one
home, and the locals are gonna go cray cray!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Palmer heads for Hakodate
Racecourse directly after doing some sightseeing.
